checks.action: Create docs/validation/cue-validation-dataset.json from real consented coach reviews and run the validation gate.
checks.label: Real cue-validation dataset

checks.action: Set Expo, App Store Connect, and Google Play submission credentials outside the repository.
checks.label: Store submission credentials

checks.action: Run npx eas-cli@latest init and store extra.eas.projectId in app.json.
checks.label: EAS project binding

checks.action: Install full Xcode and verify an iOS simulator or device build.
checks.label: iOS build verification

checks.action: Run npm run native:ios:pods until ios/Pods is populated.
checks.label: iOS pods install

checks.action: Run npm run model:movenet:readiness and keep docs/sdlc/movenet-readiness-report.json ready.
checks.label: MoveNet model readiness

checks.action: Run npm run model:analysis:replay and keep docs/sdlc/model-analysis-replay-report.json passing.
checks.label: Model-analysis replay

checks.action: Capture docs/sdlc/native-qa-evidence.json from physical iOS and Android runs.
checks.label: Native device QA evidence

checks.action: Run npm run native:qa:runbook and keep docs/sdlc/native-qa-runbook.json current.
checks.label: Native QA runbook

checks.action: Generate docs/store/store-manifest.json and keep privacy declarations current.
checks.label: Privacy declarations

checks.action: Run npm run release:check and refresh the release readiness report.
checks.label: Release gate

checks.action: Generate store listing copy and screenshots.
checks.label: Store listing kit

checks.action: Run scripts/smoke_web_video.py against the exported web bundle.
checks.label: Web preview smoke

summary.nextAction: Create docs/validation/cue-validation-dataset.json from real consented coach reviews and run the validation gate.
